This file is a merged representation of a subset of the codebase, containing specifically included files and files not matching ignore patterns, combined into a single document by Repomix.
The content has been processed where comments have been removed, content has been compressed (code blocks are separated by ⋮---- delimiter).

# File Summary

## Purpose
This file contains a packed representation of a subset of the repository's contents that is considered the most important context.
It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
or other automated processes.

## File Format
The content is organized as follows:
1. This summary section
2. Repository information
3. Directory structure
4. Repository files (if enabled)
5. Multiple file entries, each consisting of:
  a. A header with the file path (## File: path/to/file)
  b. The full contents of the file in a code block

## Usage Guidelines
- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
  original repository files, not this packed version.
- When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
  between different files in the repository.
- Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
  the same level of security as you would the original repository.

## Notes
- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
- Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
- Only files matching these patterns are included: src/**/*.ts, src/**/*.html, src/**/*.css, src/**/*.json, angular.json, package.json
- Files matching these patterns are excluded: node_modules/**, dist/**, .angular/**
- Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
- Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
- Code comments have been removed from supported file types
- Content has been compressed - code blocks are separated by ⋮---- delimiter
- Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)

```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Notice Details</h4>
    <p>Full notice information.</p>
  </div>
  <button class="btn-back" (click)="onBack()">
    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to List
  </button>
</div>

<div class="loading-overlay" *ngIf="isLoading">
  <div class="spinner-border text-primary"></div>
</div>

<ng-container *ngIf="!isLoading && notice">


  <div class="notice-view-card">


    <div class="nvc-top">
      <div class="nvc-icon-wrap">
        <div class="nvc-icon">
          <i [class]="getTypeIcon(notice.noticeType)"></i>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="nvc-no">{{ notice.noticeNo }}</div>
          <div class="nvc-type">{{ notice.noticeType }}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="nvc-badges">
        <span class="pri-badge" [ngClass]="getPriorityClass(notice.priority)">
          <i class="bi bi-flag-fill"></i> {{ notice.priority }}
        </span>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(notice.status)">
          {{ notice.status }}
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>


    <h3 class="nvc-subject">{{ notice.subject }}</h3>


    <div class="nvc-meta">
      <span class="nvc-meta-item">
        <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ notice.issuedBy }}
      </span>
      <span class="nvc-meta-item">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> {{ notice.issuedDate }}
      </span>
      <span class="nvc-meta-item" *ngIf="notice.dueDate">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar-x text-danger"></i>
        Due: {{ notice.dueDate }}
      </span>
      <span class="nvc-meta-item" *ngIf="notice.tinNumber">
        <i class="bi bi-person-badge-fill"></i>
        {{ notice.taxpayerName }} ({{ notice.tinNumber }})
      </span>
      <span class="nvc-meta-item">
        <i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i> {{ notice.targetType }}
      </span>
    </div>

  </div>


  <div class="notice-body-card">
    <div class="body-header">
      <i class="bi bi-envelope-open-fill"></i>
      <span>Message</span>
    </div>
    <div class="body-content">
      {{ notice.body }}
    </div>


    <div class="attachment-row" *ngIf="notice.attachmentName">
      <div class="attachment-item">
        <i class="bi bi-paperclip"></i>
        <span>{{ notice.attachmentName }}</span>
        <button class="btn-download">
          <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="response-card" *ngIf="notice.responseNote">
    <div class="response-header">
      <i class="bi bi-reply-fill"></i>
      <span>Response</span>
      <span class="response-date">{{ notice.responseDate }}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="response-body">{{ notice.responseNote }}</div>
  </div>


  <div class="reply-section" *ngIf="notice.status !== 'Responded'">
    <button
      class="btn-reply"
      *ngIf="!showResponse"
      (click)="showResponse = true"
    >
      <i class="bi bi-reply-fill"></i> Reply to Notice
    </button>

    <div class="reply-box" *ngIf="showResponse">
      <div class="reply-box-header">
        <i class="bi bi-reply-fill"></i>
        <span>Your Response</span>
      </div>
      <textarea
        class="reply-textarea"
        placeholder="Enter your response here..."
        [(ngModel)]="responseNote"
        rows="4"
      ></textarea>
      <div class="reply-actions">
        <button class="btn-cancel-reply" (click)="showResponse = false">
          Cancel
        </button>
        <button class="btn-send-reply" (click)="submitResponse()">
          <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Send Response
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</ng-container>
```

## File: src/app/layout/breadcrumbs/breadcrumbs.component.html
```html
<div class="breadcrumb-bar">
  <div class="breadcrumb-left">

    <div class="page-title-row">
      <div class="page-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-grid-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h5 class="page-title">{{ pageTitle }}</h5>
    </div>

    <div class="breadcrumb-pills">
      <ng-container *ngFor="let crumb of breadcrumbs; let last = last">

        <a
          *ngIf="!last"
          [routerLink]="crumb.url"
          class="crumb-pill"
        >
          <i class="bi bi-house-fill" *ngIf="crumb.label === 'Home'"></i>
          <span>{{ crumb.label }}</span>
        </a>

        <span *ngIf="!last" class="crumb-separator">
          <i class="bi bi-chevron-right"></i>
        </span>

        <span *ngIf="last" class="crumb-pill active">
          {{ crumb.label }}
        </span>

      </ng-container>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="breadcrumb-right">
    <span class="fiscal-badge">
      <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i>
      FY 2025–2026
    </span>
  </div>
</div>
```

```html
<div class="topbar" [class.search-active]="isSearchOpen">


  <div class="topbar-left" [class.hidden-on-mobile-search]="isSearchOpen">
    <button class="hamburger-btn" (click)="menuToggle.emit()" title="Toggle Sidebar">
      <i class="bi bi-list"></i>
    </button>

    <div class="topbar-title">
      <span class="title-main">National VAT & Tax Management System</span>
      <span class="title-date">{{ currentDate }}</span>
    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="search-box desktop-search">
    <i class="bi bi-search search-icon"></i>
    <input
      type="text"
      placeholder="Search taxpayer, TIN, BIN..."
      class="search-input"
    />
  </div>


  <div class="mobile-search-bar" *ngIf="isSearchOpen">
    <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    <input
      #mobileSearchInput
      type="text"
      placeholder="Search taxpayer, TIN, BIN..."
      class="mobile-search-input"
    />
    <button type="button" class="close-search-btn" (click)="closeSearch()">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
    </button>
  </div>


  <div class="topbar-right" [class.hidden]="isSearchOpen">


    <button class="icon-btn mobile-search-toggle" (click)="openSearch()">
      <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    </button>


    <div class="topbar-action" (click)="toggleNotifDropdown()">
      <button class="icon-btn" [class.active]="isNotifDropdownOpen">
        <i class="bi bi-bell-fill"></i>
        <span class="badge-dot" *ngIf="unreadCount > 0">{{ unreadCount }}</span>
      </button>

      <div class="dropdown-panel notif-panel" *ngIf="isNotifDropdownOpen">
        <div class="dropdown-header">
          <span>Notifications</span>
          <span class="badge-count">{{ unreadCount }} New</span>
        </div>

        <div class="notif-list">
          <div
            class="notif-item"
            *ngFor="let notif of notifications"
            [class.unread]="notif.unread"
          >
            <div class="notif-icon-wrap">
              <i [class]="notif.icon"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="notif-body">
              <p class="notif-text">{{ notif.text }}</p>
              <span class="notif-time">{{ notif.time }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dropdown-footer">
          <a href="#">View all notifications</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="topbar-divider"></div>


    <div class="topbar-action" (click)="toggleUserDropdown()">
      <button class="user-btn" [class.active]="isUserDropdownOpen">
        <div class="user-avatar">{{ userInitial }}</div>
        <div class="user-info">
          <span class="user-name">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</span>
          <span class="user-role">{{ currentUser?.role | titlecase }}</span>
        </div>
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-down user-chevron" [class.rotated]="isUserDropdownOpen"></i>
      </button>

      <div class="dropdown-panel user-panel" *ngIf="isUserDropdownOpen">
        <div class="dropdown-header user-header">
          <div class="user-avatar lg">{{ userInitial }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="fw-bold">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</div>
            <small class="text-muted">{{ currentUser?.email }}</small>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="dropdown-menu-list">
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item" routerLink="/profile">
            <i class="bi bi-person-circle"></i> My Profile
          </a>
          <a class="dropdown-menu-item" routerLink="/settings">
            <i class="bi bi-gear-fill"></i> Settings
          </a>

          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

```typescript
export interface DashboardStats {

  totalTaxpayers: number;
  totalBusinesses: number;
  totalVatReturns: number;
  totalPayments: number;
  totalRevenue: number;
  pendingAudits: number;
  pendingRefunds: number;
  issuedPenalties: number;
  taxpayerGrowth: number;
  revenueGrowth: number;
  vatReturnGrowth: number;
  paymentGrowth: number;


  totalAudits: number;
  completedAudits: number;
  flaggedCases: number;
  auditGrowth: number;


  todayEntries: number;
  pendingTasks: number;
  taxpayersAddedThisMonth: number;


  myVatReturns: number;
  myPayments: number;
  myPendingNotices: number;
  myRefundStatus: number;
  myTotalPaid: number;
}
⋮----
export interface RecentTaxpayer {
  id: number;
  tin: string;
  fullName: string;
  email: string;
  phone: string;
  status: 'Active' | 'Inactive' | 'Suspended';
  registrationDate: string;
}
⋮----
export interface RecentPayment {
  id: number;
  transactionId: string;
  taxpayerName: string;
  amount: number;
  paymentType: string;
  paymentDate: string;
  status: 'Completed' | 'Pending' | 'Failed';
}
⋮----
export interface RecentAudit {
  id: number;
  auditNo: string;
  taxpayerName: string;
  auditType: string;
  assignedDate: string;
  status: 'Pending' | 'In Progress' | 'Completed' | 'Flagged';
}
⋮----
export interface RecentEntry {
  id: number;
  entryType: string;
  description: string;
  enteredAt: string;
  status: 'Saved' | 'Pending' | 'Approved';
}
⋮----
export interface MyNotice {
  id: number;
  noticeNo: string;
  subject: string;
  issuedDate: string;
  dueDate: string;
  status: 'Unread' | 'Read' | 'Responded';
}
⋮----
export interface MyReturn {
  id: number;
  returnNo: string;
  period: string;
  submittedDate: string;
  amount: number;
  status: 'Submitted' | 'Approved' | 'Rejected' | 'Pending';
}
⋮----
export interface ChartDataPoint {
  label: string;
  value: number;
}
⋮----
export interface DashboardChartData {
  vatChart:     ChartDataPoint[];
  paymentChart: ChartDataPoint[];
  auditChart:   ChartDataPoint[];
  myPaymentChart: ChartDataPoint[];
}
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/models/ait.model.ts
```typescript
export type AitStatus = 'DRAFT' | 'SUBMITTED' | 'PENDING' | 'PAID' | 'UNDER_REVIEW' | 'APPROVED' | 'REJECTED' | 'CREDITED' | 'CANCELLED';
export type DocumentRequestType = 'INFO' | 'MODIFICATION' | 'CLARIFICATION';
⋮----
export interface AitRecord {
  id?: number;
  aitReferenceNo?: string;
  taxpayerId: number;
  taxpayerName?: string;
  importDutyRecordId: number;
  importDutyRefNo?: string;
  hsCode?: string;
  taxableValue: number;
  aitRate: number;
  calculatedAitAmount: number;
  approvedAitAmount?: number;
  status: AitStatus;
  assignedOfficerId?: number;
  assignedOfficerName?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
  updatedAt?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface AitDetailResponse extends AitRecord {
  statusHistory: StatusHistoryEvent[];
  documents: AitDocument[];
  pendingRequests: DocumentRequest[];
}
⋮----
export interface StatusHistoryEvent {
  id: number;
  fromStatus: AitStatus;
  toStatus: AitStatus;
  changedBy: string;
  changedAt: string;
  changeReason: string;
}
⋮----
export interface AitDocument {
  id: number;
  fileName: string;
  fileType: string;
  fileSize: number;
  uploadedBy: string;
  uploadedAt: string;
}
⋮----
export interface DocumentRequest {
  id: number;
  requestType: DocumentRequestType;
  requestedDocuments: string;
  requestReason: string;
  requestedBy: string;
  deadline: string;
  status: 'PENDING' | 'FULFILLED' | 'OVERDUE';
}
⋮----
export interface CreateAitPayload {
  taxpayerId: number;
  importDutyRecordId: number;
  hsCode?: string;
  taxableValue: number;
  aitRate: number;
}
⋮----
export interface ApproveAitPayload {
  approvedAmount?: number;
  approvalNotes?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface RejectAitPayload {
  rejectionReason: string;
  feedbackForTaxpayer?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface CreditAitPayload {
  creditAmount: number;
  creditDate: string;
}
```

## File: src/app/features/ait/services/ait.service.ts
```typescript
import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient, HttpErrorResponse } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Observable, of, throwError } from 'rxjs';
import { catchError, map } from 'rxjs/operators';
import { API_ENDPOINTS } from '../../../core/constants/api.constants';
import { BaseApiService } from '../../../core/services/base-api.service';
import {
  AitRecord,
  AitDetailResponse,
  CreateAitPayload,
  ApproveAitPayload,
  RejectAitPayload,
  CreditAitPayload,
  AitDocument,
  DocumentRequest,
} from '../models/ait.model';
import { MockAitDataService } from './mock-ait-data.service';
⋮----
export class AitService extends BaseApiService
⋮----
constructor(
    http: HttpClient,
    private mockData: MockAitDataService
)
⋮----

⋮----

⋮----

⋮----

⋮----
```

```html
<div class="auth-shell">
  <div class="auth-card">


    <div class="auth-header">
      <div class="auth-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-envelope-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h2>Forgot Password</h2>
      <p>Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a reset link.</p>
    </div>


    <div class="success-box" *ngIf="sent">
      <div class="success-icon-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Reset Link Sent!</h3>
      <p>
        If an account exists for <strong>{{ email }}</strong>, a password reset
        link has been sent. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
      </p>
      <p class="expiry-note">The link will expire in <strong>30 minutes</strong>.</p>
      <button class="btn-primary" (click)="goToLogin()">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Login
      </button>
    </div>


    <ng-container *ngIf="!sent">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Email Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input
            type="email"
            class="form-input"
            placeholder="Enter your registered email"
            [(ngModel)]="email"
            (keyup.enter)="onSubmit()"
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      <button class="btn-primary" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
          <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i> Send Reset Link
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isLoading">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          Sending...
        </span>
      </button>

      <div class="auth-footer">
        <a (click)="goToLogin()" class="back-link">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Login
        </a>
      </div>
    </ng-container>

  </div>

  <div class="auth-brand">
    <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
    <span>NBR Portal — Government of Bangladesh</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/auth/pages/reset-password/reset-password.component.html
```html
<div class="auth-shell">
  <div class="auth-card">

    <div class="auth-header">
      <div class="auth-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h2>Reset Password</h2>
      <p>Enter your new password below.</p>
    </div>


    <div class="success-box" *ngIf="success">
      <div class="success-icon-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h3>Password Reset!</h3>
      <p>Your password has been updated successfully. Redirecting to login...</p>
    </div>


    <ng-container *ngIf="!success">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label>New Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input
            type="password"
            class="form-input"
            placeholder="At least 8 characters"
            [(ngModel)]="password"
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label>Confirm Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input
            type="password"
            class="form-input"
            placeholder="Re-enter new password"
            [(ngModel)]="confirmPassword"
            (keyup.enter)="onSubmit()"
          />
        </div>
        <div class="password-match-hint"
             *ngIf="confirmPassword && password !== confirmPassword">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle-fill"></i> Passwords do not match
        </div>
      </div>

      <button class="btn-primary" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
          <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Reset Password
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isLoading">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          Resetting...
        </span>
      </button>
    </ng-container>

  </div>

  <div class="auth-brand">
    <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
    <span>NBR Portal — Government of Bangladesh</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/auth/pages/verify-otp/verify-otp.component.html
```html
<div class="auth-shell">
  <div class="auth-card">

    <div class="auth-header">
      <div class="auth-icon otp-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <h2>Verify Your Email</h2>
      <p>
        We've sent a 6-digit verification code to<br>
        <strong>{{ email }}</strong>
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="otp-input-wrap">
      <input
        type="text"
        class="otp-input"
        maxlength="6"
        placeholder="Enter 6-digit OTP"
        [(ngModel)]="otp"
        (keyup.enter)="onVerify()"
        autocomplete="one-time-code"
      />
    </div>

    <button class="btn-primary" (click)="onVerify()" [disabled]="isLoading || otp.length !== 6">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Verify Email
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
        Verifying...
      </span>
    </button>

    <div class="resend-section">
      <span *ngIf="!canResend" class="countdown-text">
        Resend OTP in <strong>{{ countdown }}s</strong>
      </span>
      <button
        *ngIf="canResend"
        class="btn-resend"
        (click)="onResend()"
        [disabled]="isResending"
      >
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i>
        {{ isResending ? 'Sending...' : 'Resend OTP' }}
      </button>
    </div>

    <div class="auth-footer">
      <a (click)="goToLogin()" class="back-link">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back to Login
      </a>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="auth-brand">
    <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
    <span>NBR Portal — Government of Bangladesh</span>
  </div>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/certificate-management/models/certificate.model.ts
```typescript
export type CertificateType = 'TIN' | 'BIN' | 'TAX_CLEARANCE' | 'RETURN_ACK';
⋮----
export interface Certificate {
  id:              number;
  certificateNo:   string;
  type:            CertificateType;
  holderName:      string;
  referenceNo:     string;
  issuedDate:      string;
  expiryDate?:     string;
  status:          string;
  taxZone?:        string;
  taxCircle?:      string;
  assessmentYear?: string;
  sourceId:        number;
}
⋮----
export interface TaxClearanceCreateRequest {
  taxpayerId:     number;
  assessmentYear: string;
  issuedDate?:    string;
  validUntil?:    string;
  remarks?:       string;
}
⋮----
export interface PublicVerifyResult {
  valid:           boolean;
  certificateNo?:  string;
  taxpayerName?:   string;
  tinNumber?:      string;
  assessmentYear?: string;
  issuedDate?:     string;
  validUntil?:     string;
  status?:         string;
  message?:        string;
}
```

```html
      <div class="kpi-icon kpi-ack"><i class="bi bi-receipt"></i></div>
      <div class="kpi-body">
        <div class="kpi-value">{{ countByType('RETURN_ACK') }}</div>
        <div class="kpi-label">Return Ack.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="filter-bar">
    <div class="tab-group">
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'ALL'" (click)="setTab('ALL')">
        All <span class="tab-count">{{ certificates.length }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'TIN'" (click)="setTab('TIN')">
        TIN <span class="tab-count">{{ countByType('TIN') }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'BIN'" (click)="setTab('BIN')">
        BIN <span class="tab-count">{{ countByType('BIN') }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'TAX_CLEARANCE'" (click)="setTab('TAX_CLEARANCE')">
        Tax Clearance <span class="tab-count">{{ countByType('TAX_CLEARANCE') }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="tab-btn" [class.active]="activeTab === 'RETURN_ACK'" (click)="setTab('RETURN_ACK')">
        Return Ack. <span class="tab-count">{{ countByType('RETURN_ACK') }}</span>
      </button>
    </div>
    <div class="search-wrap">
      <i class="bi bi-search search-icon"></i>
      <input class="search-input" type="text"
        placeholder="Search by name, TIN, BIN, certificate no..."
        [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="data-table-wrap">
    <table class="data-table" *ngIf="filtered.length > 0; else emptyState">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Certificate No.</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Holder / Business</th>
          <th>Reference No.</th>
          <th>Assessment Year</th>
          <th>Issued Date</th>
          <th>Expiry / Valid Until</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Download</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let cert of filtered" (click)="onView(cert)" class="clickable-row">
          <td><span class="cert-no">{{ cert.certificateNo }}</span></td>
          <td><span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(cert.type)">{{ getTypeLabel(cert.type) }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ cert.holderName }}</td>
          <td><code>{{ cert.referenceNo }}</code></td>
          <td>{{ cert.assessmentYear || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ cert.issuedDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</td>
          <td>{{ cert.expiryDate ? (cert.expiryDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy') : '—' }}</td>
          <td><span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(cert.status)">{{ cert.status }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <button class="btn-download" [disabled]="isDownloading(cert)" (click)="onDownload(cert, $event)">
              <span *ngIf="!isDownloading(cert)"><i class="bi bi-download"></i></span>
              <span *ngIf="isDownloading(cert)"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span></span>
            </button>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <ng-template #emptyState>
      <div class="empty-state">
        <i class="bi bi-patch-exclamation"></i>
        <p>No certificates found.</p>
      </div>
    </ng-template>
  </div>

</ng-container>


<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showCreateModal" (click)="closeCreateModal()">
  <div class="modal-box" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h5><i class="bi bi-shield-check-fill"></i> Issue Tax Clearance Certificate</h5>
      <button class="modal-close" (click)="closeCreateModal()"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i></button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer ID</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="number" [(ngModel)]="tcForm.taxpayerId"
          placeholder="e.g. 12" />
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Assessment Year</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="text" [(ngModel)]="tcForm.assessmentYear"
          placeholder="e.g. 2024-25" />
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <textarea class="form-input" rows="3" [(ngModel)]="tcForm.remarks"
          placeholder="Optional remarks..."></textarea>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="closeCreateModal()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-confirm" (click)="onCreateTaxClearance()" [disabled]="createLoading">
        <span *ngIf="!createLoading"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Issue Certificate</span>
        <span *ngIf="createLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Issuing...</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```html
            Value cannot be negative.
          </span>
        </div>

      </div>


      <div class="subtotal-bar liab-bar">
        <i class="bi bi-dash-circle me-2"></i>
        Total Liabilities : <strong>{{ fmt(form.value.personalLiabilities || 0) }}</strong>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="section-divider"></div>


    <div class="form-section">
      <div class="wealth-summary-table">
        <div class="ws-row">
          <span class="ws-label">Total Assets</span>
          <span class="ws-value assets-val">{{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ws-row">
          <span class="ws-label">Less: Total Liabilities</span>
          <span class="ws-value liab-val">{{ fmt(form.value.personalLiabilities || 0) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="ws-divider"></div>
        <div class="ws-row ws-total-row">
          <span class="ws-label bold">Net Wealth </span>
          <span class="ws-value" [class.net-positive]="netWealth >= 0" [class.net-negative]="netWealth < 0">
            {{ fmt(netWealth) }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="ws-note" *ngIf="netWealth < 0">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
          Net wealth is negative — liabilities exceed total assets. Please review the figures.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>


    <div class="form-actions">
      <button type="button" class="btn-cancel" (click)="goBack()" [disabled]="isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-reset"  (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isSaving">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
      </button>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="isSaving || form.invalid">
        <span *ngIf="!isSaving">
          <i class="bi bi-send-fill"></i>
          {{ isEditMode ? 'Update Statement' : 'Submit Statement' }}
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isSaving">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          {{ isEditMode ? 'Updating...' : 'Submitting...' }}
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
  </form>

</ng-container>
```

```html
<div class="reg-page">

      <div class="step-track"
        *ngFor="let s of steps; let last = last"
        [class.completed]="currentStep > s.num"
        [class.active]="currentStep === s.num">
        <div class="step-dot">
          <i *ngIf="currentStep > s.num" class="bi bi-check-lg"></i>
          <i *ngIf="currentStep <= s.num" [class]="'bi ' + s.icon"></i>
        </div>
        <div class="step-label">
          <span class="step-num">Step {{ s.num }}</span>
          <span class="step-name">{{ s.label }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="step-line" *ngIf="!last"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

      <div class="rf-item"><i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i><span>Your data is encrypted and secure</span></div>

        <div class="progress-bar-track">

        </div>
        <span class="progress-label">Step {{ currentStep }} of 4</span>
      </div>

        [state]="state"
        (next)="onStep1Next($event)">
      </app-reg-step-account-type>


      <app-reg-step-credentials
        *ngIf="currentStep === 2"
        [state]="state"
        (next)="onStep2Next($event)"
        (back)="onBack(1)">
      </app-reg-step-credentials>


      <app-reg-step-identity
        *ngIf="currentStep === 3"
        [state]="state"
        (next)="onStep3Next($event)"
        (back)="onBack(2)">
      </app-reg-step-identity>


      <app-reg-step-review
        *ngIf="currentStep === 4"
        [state]="state"
        [isSubmitting]="isSubmitting"
        (submit)="onSubmit()"
        (back)="onBack(3)">
      </app-reg-step-review>


      <app-reg-step-success
        *ngIf="currentStep === 5 && registrationResponse"
        [response]="registrationResponse">
      </app-reg-step-success>


      <p class="reg-login-link" *ngIf="currentStep < 5">
        Already have an account?
        <a routerLink="/auth/login">Sign In</a>
      </p>

    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

```html
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" placeholder="As it appears on your NID / company documents"
            formControlName="fullName" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('fullName')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('fullName')?.touched">
          Full name is required.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('fullName')?.errors?.['minlength'] && ctrl('fullName')?.touched">
          Name must be at least 3 characters.
        </span>
      </div>


      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Email Address</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('email')?.invalid && ctrl('email')?.touched">
          <i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="email" class="form-input" placeholder="your@email.com"
            formControlName="email" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('email')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('email')?.touched">
          Email is required.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('email')?.errors?.['email'] && ctrl('email')?.touched">
          Enter a valid email address.
        </span>
      </div>


      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Mobile Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('phone')?.invalid && ctrl('phone')?.touched">
          <i class="bi bi-phone-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="tel" class="form-input" placeholder="01XXXXXXXXX"
            formControlName="phone" maxlength="11" />
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('phone')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('phone')?.touched">
          Phone number is required.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('phone')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('phone')?.touched">
          Enter a valid Bangladeshi number (e.g. 01712345678).
        </span>
      </div>


      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="ctrl('password')?.invalid && ctrl('password')?.touched">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input [type]="showPassword ? 'text' : 'password'" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Create a strong password" formControlName="password" />
          <button type="button" class="toggle-pass" (click)="showPassword = !showPassword">
            <i [class]="showPassword ? 'bi bi-eye-slash-fill' : 'bi bi-eye-fill'"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('password')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('password')?.touched">
          Password is required.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('password')?.errors?.['pattern'] && ctrl('password')?.touched">
          Min 8 characters, one uppercase letter, one number, one special character.
        </span>
      </div>


      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Confirm Password</label>
        <div class="input-wrap" [class.input-error]="(ctrl('confirmPassword')?.invalid && ctrl('confirmPassword')?.touched) || passwordMismatch">
          <i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input [type]="showConfirmPassword ? 'text' : 'password'" class="form-input"
            placeholder="Repeat your password" formControlName="confirmPassword" />
          <button type="button" class="toggle-pass" (click)="showConfirmPassword = !showConfirmPassword">
            <i [class]="showConfirmPassword ? 'bi bi-eye-slash-fill' : 'bi bi-eye-fill'"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="ctrl('confirmPassword')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('confirmPassword')?.touched">
          Please confirm your password.
        </span>
        <span class="field-error" *ngIf="passwordMismatch">
          Passwords do not match.
        </span>
      </div>

    </div>


      <div class="pw-hints">
        <span class="pw-hint" [class.met]="hasMinLength">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> 8+ characters
        </span>
        <span class="pw-hint" [class.met]="hasUpperCase">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Uppercase letter
        </span>
        <span class="pw-hint" [class.met]="hasNumber">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Number
        </span>
        <span class="pw-hint" [class.met]="hasSpecialChar">
          <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill"></i> Special character
        </span>
      </div>

  </form>

  <div class="step-actions">
    <button type="button" class="btn-back" (click)="back.emit()">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="btn-next" (click)="onNext()">
      Continue <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/public-verify/pages/verify-page/verify-page.component.html
```html
<div class="verify-wrapper">


  <div class="verify-header">
    <div class="gov-badge">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
      <span>National Board of Revenue</span>
    </div>
    <h1>Certificate Verification Portal</h1>
    <p>Enter a Tax Clearance Certificate number to verify its authenticity.</p>
  </div>


  <div class="verify-card">
    <div class="search-group">
      <label class="search-label">Certificate Number</label>
      <div class="search-row">
        <input
          class="search-input"
          type="text"
          [(ngModel)]="certNo"
          placeholder="e.g. CERT-TC-2025-00001"
          (keyup.enter)="onVerify()"
        />
        <button class="btn-verify" (click)="onVerify()" [disabled]="isLoading || !certNo.trim()">
          <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Verify</span>
          <span *ngIf="isLoading"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Verifying...</span>
        </button>
        <button class="btn-clear" *ngIf="certNo" (click)="onClear()">
          <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
      <p class="search-hint">Only Tax Clearance Certificates can be verified publicly.</p>
    </div>


    <div class="result-box result-valid" *ngIf="result?.valid">
      <div class="result-icon valid-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-patch-check-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="result-content">
        <div class="result-title">Certificate Verified</div>
        <div class="result-sub">This is a genuine NBR-issued Tax Clearance Certificate.</div>

        <div class="result-grid">
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Certificate No.</div>
            <div class="field-value mono">{{ result?.certificateNo }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Taxpayer Name</div>
            <div class="field-value">{{ result?.taxpayerName }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">TIN Number</div>
            <div class="field-value mono">{{ result?.tinNumber }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Assessment Year</div>
            <div class="field-value">{{ result?.assessmentYear }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Issued Date</div>
            <div class="field-value">{{ result?.issuedDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Valid Until</div>
            <div class="field-value">{{ result?.validUntil | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="result-field">
            <div class="field-label">Status</div>
            <div class="field-value">
              <span class="status-badge status-approved">{{ result?.status }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>


    <div class="result-box result-invalid" *ngIf="searched && result && !result.valid">
      <div class="result-icon invalid-icon">
        <i class="bi bi-x-circle-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="result-content">
        <div class="result-title">Not Found</div>
        <div class="result-sub">{{ result?.message || 'No valid certificate found for this number.' }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>


  <div class="verify-footer">
    <p>For queries, contact NBR at <strong>nbr@nbr.gov.bd</strong></p>
  </div>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/features/refund-management/components/refund-status-timeline/refund-status-timeline.component.html
```html
<div class="timeline" role="list" aria-label="Refund status history">

  <div *ngIf="!history || history.length === 0" class="text-center text-muted py-3">
    <i class="bi bi-clock-history fs-4 d-block mb-2"></i>
    <small>No status history yet.</small>
  </div>

  <div
    *ngFor="let item of history; let last = last; trackBy: trackByHistoryId"
    class="timeline-item"
    [class.timeline-item--last]="last"
    role="listitem"
  >

    <div class="timeline-left">
      <div class="timeline-dot" [ngClass]="getColor(item.toStatus)">
        <i [class]="getIcon(item.toStatus)" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-line" *ngIf="!last"></div>
    </div>


    <div class="timeline-content" [class.mb-0]="last">
      <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
        <span class="timeline-status" [ngClass]="getColor(item.toStatus)">
          {{ item.toStatus | titlecase }}
        </span>
        <span class="timeline-role badge bg-light text-secondary border">
          {{ item.changedByRole | titlecase }}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-actor mt-1">
        <i class="bi bi-person me-1" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        {{ item.changedByName }}
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-time">
        <i class="bi bi-clock me-1" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        {{ item.changedAt | date: 'dd MMM yyyy, hh:mm a' }}
      </div>
      <div class="timeline-reason" *ngIf="item.changeReason">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-left-text me-1" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        {{ item.changeReason }}
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

```html
  </div>

    <div class="col-lg-8">


      <div class="request-box mb-4">
        <div class="request-box-header">
          <i class="bi bi-question-circle-fill text-warning me-2"></i>
          Officer's Information Request
        </div>
        <div class="request-box-body">

          <div *ngFor="let note of refund.statusHistory">
            <div *ngIf="note.toStatus === 'INFO_REQUESTED'" class="request-content">
              <p class="mb-2 small">{{ note.changeReason || 'Please provide additional information or documents as required.' }}</p>
              <div class="d-flex gap-3 text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">
                <span><i class="bi bi-person me-1"></i>{{ note.changedByName }}</span>
                <span><i class="bi bi-clock me-1"></i>{{ note.changedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, hh:mm a' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="alert alert-warning py-2 small mt-2 mb-0">
            <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i>
            Please respond promptly. Failure to respond may result in rejection of your application.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>


      <div class="wizard-card">
        <div class="wizard-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-chat-text me-2"></i> Your Response
        </div>
        <div class="wizard-card-body">


          <div class="mb-4">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold small">
              Response / Explanation <span class="text-danger">*</span>
            </label>
            <textarea
              class="form-control"
              rows="5"
              [(ngModel)]="responseText"
              placeholder="Provide a detailed explanation addressing the officer's request. Minimum 10 characters."
              [class.is-invalid]="responseText.length > 0 && responseText.trim().length < 10"
              aria-label="Response text"
            ></textarea>
            <div class="d-flex justify-content-between mt-1">
              <div *ngIf="responseText.length > 0 && responseText.trim().length < 10"
                class="invalid-feedback d-block small">
                Minimum 10 characters required.
              </div>
              <div class="text-muted ms-auto" style="font-size:.72rem">
                {{ responseText.length }} characters
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>


          <div class="mb-3">
            <label class="form-label fw-semibold small">
              Additional Supporting Documents <em class="text-muted fw-normal">(optional)</em>
            </label>
            <div class="row g-2 align-items-end mb-2">
              <div class="col-md-5">
                <label class="form-label small">Document Type</label>
                <select class="form-select form-select-sm" [(ngModel)]="selectedDocType">
                  <option *ngFor="let d of documentTypes" [value]="d.value">{{ d.label }}</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-5">
                <label class="form-label small">Choose File</label>
                <input
                  type="file"
                  class="form-control form-control-sm"
                  (change)="onFileSelect($event)"
                  accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png"
                  aria-label="Upload additional document"
                >
              </div>
            </div>

            <div *ngIf="uploadError" class="alert alert-danger py-2 small">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle me-1"></i> {{ uploadError }}
            </div>


            <div *ngFor="let f of uploadedFiles; let i = index" class="uploaded-file-item">
              <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5 flex-shrink-0" aria-hidden="true"></i>
              <div class="flex-grow-1">
                <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ f.name }}</div>
                <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">{{ getDocTypeLabel(f.type) }} · {{ f.size }}</div>
              </div>
              <button class="btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm py-0 px-2"
                (click)="removeFile(i)" [attr.aria-label]="'Remove ' + f.name">
                <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>


          <div class="declaration-box">
            <i class="bi bi-info-circle text-primary me-2"></i>
            <span class="small">
              By submitting this response, you confirm that all information and documents provided are true
              and accurate. Your response will be reviewed by the assigned officer.
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="wizard-card-footer">
          <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" (click)="cancel()">
            <i class="bi bi-x-lg me-1"></i> Cancel
          </button>
          <button
            class="btn btn-success btn-sm"
            (click)="submit()"
            [disabled]="!canSubmit || submitting"
          >
            <span *ngIf="submitting" class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-1"></span>
            <i *ngIf="!submitting" class="bi bi-send me-1"></i>
            {{ submitting ? 'Submitting Response…' : 'Submit Response' }}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```html
<div class="page-header" *ngIf="auditCase">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <div class="detail-case-badge">{{ auditCase.caseNo }}</div>

      <span class="meta-chip"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> {{ auditCase.fiscalYear || '—' }}</span>
      <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(auditCase.status)">
        {{ getStatusLabel(auditCase.status) }}
      </span>
    </div>

    <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
  </button>

<div class="page-wrapper" *ngIf="!isLoading && auditCase">

    <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle-fill"></i>
    <div>
      <strong>Action Required: </strong>
      <span *ngIf="auditCase.status === 'DOCUMENT_REQUESTED'">
        Documents have been requested. Please upload them as soon as possible.
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="auditCase.openQueryCount > 0">
        You have {{ auditCase.openQueryCount }} unanswered {{ auditCase.openQueryCount === 1 ? 'query' : 'queries' }}.
      </span>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-respond-now" (click)="scrollToRespond()">
      Respond Now <i class="bi bi-arrow-down"></i>
    </button>
  </div>


  <div class="tp-demand-banner" *ngIf="auditCase.status === 'DEMAND_ISSUED' && demandNotice">
    <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
    <div>
      <strong>Demand Notice Issued</strong><br>
      Amount Due: <strong>{{ demandNotice.amountDue | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</strong>
      · Due Date: <strong>{{ demandNotice.dueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</strong>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-pay-now" (click)="goToPay()">Pay Now</button>
  </div>


  <div class="detail-tabs-wrapper">
    <div class="detail-tabs">
      <button class="dtab" [class.active]="activeTab === 'overview'"
        (click)="setTab('overview')"><i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill"></i> Details</button>
      <button class="dtab" [class.active]="activeTab === 'queries'"
        (click)="setTab('queries'); loadQueries()">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-dots-fill"></i> Queries
        <span class="tab-count warn" *ngIf="auditCase.openQueryCount > 0">
          {{ auditCase.openQueryCount }}
        </span>
      </button>
      <button class="dtab" [class.active]="activeTab === 'documents'"
        (click)="setTab('documents'); loadDocRequests()">
        <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i> Documents
      </button>
      <button class="dtab" [class.active]="activeTab === 'assessment'"
        *ngIf="auditCase.hasAssessment"
        (click)="setTab('assessment'); loadAssessment()">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Assessment Order
      </button>
      <button class="dtab" [class.active]="activeTab === 'demand'"
        *ngIf="auditCase.hasDemandNotice"
        (click)="setTab('demand'); loadDemand()">
        <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i> Demand Notice
      </button>
    </div>


    <div class="dtab-content" *ngIf="activeTab === 'overview'">
      <div class="row g-3">
        <div class="col-md-6">
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="ic-header"><i class="bi bi-folder-fill"></i> Case Information</div>
            <div class="ic-body">
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Case No</label><span class="code-val">{{ auditCase.caseNo }}</span></div>
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Audit Type</label><span>{{ getTypeLabel(auditCase.auditType) }}</span></div>
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Tax Type</label><span>{{ getTaxTypeLabel(auditCase.taxType) }}</span></div>
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Fiscal Year</label><span>{{ auditCase.fiscalYear || '—' }}</span></div>
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Period</label>
                <span>{{ auditCase.taxPeriodStart || '—' }} → {{ auditCase.taxPeriodEnd || '—' }}</span>
              </div>
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Status</label>
                <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(auditCase.status)">
                  {{ getStatusLabel(auditCase.status) }}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-6">
          <div class="info-card">
            <div class="ic-header"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i> Contact Details</div>
            <div class="ic-body">
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Audit Officer</label><span>{{ auditCase.assignedOfficerName || '—' }}</span></div>
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Supervisor</label><span>{{ auditCase.supervisorName || '—' }}</span></div>
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Due Date</label>
                <span [class]="isDue(auditCase.dueDate) ? 'due-overdue' : ''">
                  {{ auditCase.dueDate || '—' }}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div class="ic-row"><label>Notice Issued</label><span>{{ auditCase.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>


    <div class="dtab-content" id="respond-section" *ngIf="activeTab === 'queries'">
      <h6 class="tab-section-title">Queries from Audit Officer</h6>
      <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="queriesLoading">
        <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="!queriesLoading">
        <div class="tp-query-card" *ngFor="let q of queries">
          <div class="tpqc-header">
            <span class="code-val">{{ q.queryNo }}</span>
            <span class="tpqc-type">{{ q.queryType }}</span>
            <span class="status-badge"
              [ngClass]="q.status === 'OPEN' ? 'badge-warning' : 'badge-success'">
              {{ q.status }}
            </span>
            <span class="tpqc-deadline" *ngIf="q.deadline">
              <i class="bi bi-alarm"></i> Due: {{ q.deadline | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="tpqc-subject">{{ q.subject }}</div>
          <div class="tpqc-text">{{ q.queryText }}</div>


          <div class="tpqc-response" *ngIf="q.responseText">
            <div class="tpqcr-label"><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success"></i> Your Response</div>
            <div class="tpqcr-text">{{ q.responseText }}</div>
            <div class="tpqcr-meta">Responded: {{ q.respondedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</div>
          </div>


          <div class="tpqc-respond-form" *ngIf="q.status === 'OPEN'">
            <label class="form-label">Your Response</label>
            <textarea class="form-control mb-2" rows="3"
              [(ngModel)]="queryResponses[q.id]"
              placeholder="Type your response here..."></textarea>
            <button class="btn-respond"
              [disabled]="!queryResponses[q.id] || respondingQueryId === q.id"
              (click)="respondToQuery(q.id)">
              <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" *ngIf="respondingQueryId === q.id"></span>
              <i class="bi bi-send-fill" *ngIf="respondingQueryId !== q.id"></i>
              Submit Response
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="queries.length === 0">
          <i class="bi bi-chat-dots"></i><p>No queries have been raised yet.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>


    <div class="dtab-content" *ngIf="activeTab === 'documents'">
      <h6 class="tab-section-title">Document Requests</h6>
      <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="docsLoading">
        <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
      </div>
      <div *ngIf="!docsLoading">
        <div class="tp-doc-card" *ngFor="let dr of docRequests">
          <div class="tpdc-header">
            <span class="code-val">{{ dr.requestNo }}</span>
            <span class="tpdc-type">{{ dr.requestType }}</span>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getDocStatusClass(dr.status)">{{ dr.status }}</span>
            <span *ngIf="dr.deadline" [class]="isDue(dr.deadline) ? 'due-overdue tpdc-deadline' : 'tpdc-deadline'">
              <i class="bi bi-alarm"></i> Due: {{ dr.deadline | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
            </span>
          </div>
          <div class="tpdc-docs"><i class="bi bi-files text-primary"></i> {{ dr.requestedDocuments }}</div>
          <div class="tpdc-reason" *ngIf="dr.requestReason">{{ dr.requestReason }}</div>


          <div class="tpdc-fulfilled" *ngIf="dr.status === 'FULFILLED'">
            <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success"></i> Fulfilled: {{ dr.fulfillmentNotes }}
          </div>


          <div class="tpdc-upload-zone" *ngIf="dr.status === 'PENDING' || dr.status === 'PARTIALLY_FULFILLED'">
            <label class="form-label">Upload Documents</label>
            <div class="upload-drop-zone"
              [class.drag-over]="dragOverId === dr.id"
              (dragover)="onDragOver($event, dr.id)"
              (dragleave)="dragOverId = null"
              (drop)="onDrop($event, dr.id)"
              (click)="triggerFileInput(dr.id)">
              <i class="bi bi-cloud-upload-fill"></i>
              <p>Drag & drop files here, or click to browse</p>
              <span class="upload-hint">PDF, JPG, PNG, XLSX — max 10MB each</span>
              <input type="file" multiple [id]="'file-input-' + dr.id"
                style="display:none"
                (change)="onFileSelected($event, dr.id)" />
            </div>

            <div class="selected-files" *ngIf="selectedFiles[dr.id]?.length">
              <div class="sf-item" *ngFor="let f of selectedFiles[dr.id]; let i = index">
                <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-fill"></i>
                <span>{{ f.name }}</span>
                <span class="sf-size">({{ formatSize(f.size) }})</span>
                <button class="sf-remove" (click)="removeFile(dr.id, i)">
                  <i class="bi bi-x"></i>
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="form-group mt-2">
              <label class="form-label">Description / Notes</label>
              <input type="text" class="form-control"
                [(ngModel)]="uploadDescriptions[dr.id]"
                placeholder="Brief description of uploaded documents..." />
            </div>

            <button class="btn-upload mt-2"
              [disabled]="!selectedFiles[dr.id]?.length || uploadingId === dr.id"
              (click)="uploadDocuments(dr.id)">
              <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" *ngIf="uploadingId === dr.id"></span>
              <i class="bi bi-cloud-upload" *ngIf="uploadingId !== dr.id"></i>
              Upload Documents
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="docRequests.length === 0">
          <i class="bi bi-folder2"></i><p>No document requests yet.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>


    <div class="dtab-content" *ngIf="activeTab === 'assessment'">
      <ng-container *ngIf="assessment">
        <div class="tp-assessment-order">
          <div class="tpao-letterhead">
            <div class="tpao-logo">
              <div class="tpao-logo-circle">NBR</div>
              <div>
                <div class="tpao-org">National Board of Revenue</div>
                <div class="tpao-sub">Government of the People's Republic of Bangladesh</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tpao-title">ASSESSMENT ORDER</div>
            <div class="tpao-ref">Ref: {{ assessment.assessmentNo }}</div>
          </div>

          <div class="tpao-party-row">
            <div><label>Taxpayer</label><span>{{ assessment.taxpayerName }}</span></div>
            <div><label>TIN</label><span class="code-val">{{ assessment.tinNumber }}</span></div>
            <div><label>Fiscal Year</label><span>{{ assessment.fiscalYear }}</span></div>
            <div><label>Tax Type</label><span>{{ assessment.taxType }}</span></div>
          </div>

          <div class="tpao-section-title">Findings Summary</div>
          <div class="tpao-text">{{ assessment.findingsSummary || 'As per audit findings.' }}</div>

          <div class="tpao-section-title">Legal Basis</div>
          <div class="tpao-text">{{ assessment.legalBasis || '—' }}</div>

          <div class="tpao-section-title">Demand Calculation</div>
          <table class="tpao-table">
            <tr><th>Description</th><th>Amount (BDT)</th></tr>
            <tr><td>Declared Tax</td><td>{{ assessment.declaredTax | number:'1.2-2' }}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Assessed Tax</td><td>{{ assessment.assessedTax | number:'1.2-2' }}</td></tr>
            <tr class="tr-highlight">
              <td><strong>Additional Tax</strong></td>
              <td><strong>{{ assessment.additionalTax | number:'1.2-2' }}</strong></td>
            </tr>
            <tr><td>Penalty ({{ assessment.penaltyRate }}%)</td><td>{{ assessment.penaltyAmount | number:'1.2-2' }}</td></tr>
            <tr><td>Interest ({{ assessment.interestRate }}% × {{ assessment.interestMonths }} months)</td><td>{{ assessment.interestAmount | number:'1.2-2' }}</td></tr>
            <tr class="tr-total">
              <td><strong>TOTAL DEMAND</strong></td>
              <td><strong>{{ assessment.totalDemand | number:'1.2-2' }}</strong></td>
            </tr>
          </table>

          <div class="tpao-section-title">Appeal Rights</div>
          <div class="tpao-appeal-box">
            <i class="bi bi-info-circle-fill text-primary"></i>
            {{ assessment.appealRights }}
          </div>

          <div class="tpao-footer-row">
            <div>
              <label>Payment Deadline</label>
              <span class="due-date-val">{{ assessment.paymentDeadline | date:'dd MMMM yyyy' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label>Approved By</label>
              <span>{{ assessment.approvedBy || '—' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label>Approved On</label>
              <span>{{ assessment.approvedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="tpao-actions">
            <button class="btn-download" (click)="downloadAssessment()">
              <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download PDF
            </button>
            <button class="btn-appeal" (click)="goToAppeal()">
              <i class="bi bi-shield-exclamation"></i> File Appeal
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>
    </div>


    <div class="dtab-content" *ngIf="activeTab === 'demand'">
      <ng-container *ngIf="demandNotice">
        <div class="tp-demand-order">
          <div class="tpdo-header">
            <div class="tpdo-badge">DEMAND NOTICE</div>
            <div class="tpdo-number">{{ demandNotice.demandNo }}</div>
          </div>

          <div class="tpdo-amount-box">
            <label>Total Amount Due</label>
            <div class="tpdo-amount">{{ demandNotice.amountDue | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</div>
            <div class="tpdo-due" [class.overdue]="isDue(demandNotice.dueDate)">
              Pay by: {{ demandNotice.dueDate | date:'dd MMMM yyyy' }}
              <span class="overdue-tag" *ngIf="isDue(demandNotice.dueDate)">OVERDUE</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="tpdo-info-row">
            <div class="tpdo-info-item"><label>Taxpayer</label><span>{{ demandNotice.taxpayerName }}</span></div>
            <div class="tpdo-info-item"><label>TIN</label><span class="code-val">{{ demandNotice.tinNumber }}</span></div>
            <div class="tpdo-info-item"><label>Assessment No</label><span class="code-val">{{ demandNotice.assessmentNo }}</span></div>
            <div class="tpdo-info-item"><label>Issued By</label><span>{{ demandNotice.issuedBy }}</span></div>
            <div class="tpdo-info-item"><label>Issued On</label><span>{{ demandNotice.issuedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span></div>
            <div class="tpdo-info-item"><label>Status</label>
              <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getDemandStatusClass(demandNotice.status)">
                {{ demandNotice.status }}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="tpdo-payment-instructions">
            <div class="tpdo-pi-title"><i class="bi bi-bank"></i> Payment Instructions</div>
            <div class="tpdo-pi-text">{{ demandNotice.paymentInstructions }}</div>
          </div>

          <div class="tpdo-actions">
            <button class="btn-download" (click)="downloadDemand()">
              <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Notice
            </button>
            <button class="btn-pay-now" (click)="goToPay()">
              <i class="bi bi-credit-card-fill"></i> Pay Now
            </button>
            <button class="btn-appeal" (click)="goToAppeal()">
              <i class="bi bi-shield-exclamation"></i> File Appeal
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>My Audits</h4>
    <p>View all audit cases opened against your tax account.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">
  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading your audit cases...</span>
  </div>


  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Case No</th>
          <th>Audit Type</th>
          <th>Tax Type</th>
          <th>Fiscal Year</th>
          <th>Notice Date</th>
          <th>Due Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Action Required</th>
          <th></th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let c of cases; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="case-code">{{ c.caseNo }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(c.auditType)">
              {{ getTypeLabel(c.auditType) }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>{{ getTaxTypeLabel(c.taxType) }}</td>
          <td>{{ c.fiscalYear || '—' }}</td>
          <td>{{ c.createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</td>
          <td>
            <span [class]="isDue(c.dueDate) ? 'due-overdue' : ''">
              {{ c.dueDate || '—' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(c.status)">
              {{ getStatusLabel(c.status) }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <span class="action-required-chip" *ngIf="requiresAction(c)">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle-fill"></i>
              {{ getActionRequired(c) }}
            </span>
            <span class="no-action" *ngIf="!requiresAction(c)">—</span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(c.id)">
              <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
            </button>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="cases.length === 0">
          <td colspan="10">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i>
              <p>No audit cases found on your account.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>


  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let c of cases"
      [class.mobile-card-alert]="requiresAction(c)">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div>
          <div class="case-code">{{ c.caseNo }}</div>
          <div class="mobile-sub">{{ getTypeLabel(c.auditType) }} · {{ c.fiscalYear }}</div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(c.status)">
          {{ getStatusLabel(c.status) }}
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="action-required-chip mb-2" *ngIf="requiresAction(c)">
        <i class="bi bi-exclamation-circle-fill"></i>
        {{ getActionRequired(c) }}
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(c.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View Details
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="cases.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i><p>No audit cases found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```html
<div class="page-header">
```

```html
        <label class="form-label required">Email</label>
           <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill input-icon"></i>
            <input type="email" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.email" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
        </div>
        <div class="section-divider"></div>
        <div class="form-section">
          <div class="section-header">
            <div class="section-icon purple"><i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i></div>
            <div><h6 class="section-title">Role & Access</h6><span class="section-sub">Update role, department and status</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-grid">
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label required">Role</label>
              <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-lock-fill input-icon"></i>
                <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.role">
                  <option *ngFor="let r of roles" [value]="r">{{ r }}</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label">Department</label>
              <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-building input-icon"></i>
                <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.department">
                  <option *ngFor="let d of departments" [value]="d">{{ d }}</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group">
              <label class="form-label">Status</label>
              <div class="input-wrap"><i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
                <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
                  <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-actions">
          <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving"><i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel</button>
          <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
            <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update User</span>
            <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
          </button>
      </div>
</div>
```

```html
<div class="search-row">
  <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
    <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
    <input
      type="text"
      class="form-input"
      placeholder="Enter TIN number, NID or taxpayer name…"
      [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
      [ngModelOptions]="{ standalone: true }"
      (ngModelChange)="onInputChange()"
      (keyup.enter)="onSearch()"
      [disabled]="isLocked"
    />
    <button
      *ngIf="isLocked"
      type="button"
      class="clear-btn"
      title="Clear selection"
      (click)="onClear()"
    >
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
    </button>
  </div>

  <button
    type="button"
    class="btn-search"
    (click)="onSearch()"
    [disabled]="isSearching || isLocked"
  >
    <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
    <span *ngIf="isSearching">
      <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching…
    </span>
  </button>
</div>


<div class="search-results" *ngIf="showResults && searchResults.length > 0">
  <div
    class="result-item"
    *ngFor="let tp of searchResults"
    (click)="onSelect(tp)"
    [class.disabled]="isIneligible(tp)"
    [title]="isIneligible(tp) ? 'Taxpayer is suspended and cannot be registered for VAT.' : ''"
  >
    <div class="result-avatar">
      <i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="result-info">
      <span class="result-name">{{ getDisplayName(tp) }}</span>
      <span class="result-meta">
        <span *ngIf="tp.tinNumber" class="fw-bold me-2">TIN: {{ tp.tinNumber }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="tp.phone"> · {{ tp.phone }}</span>
        <span
          *ngIf="isIneligible(tp)"
          class="ms-2"
          style="color:#e74c3c;font-weight:700"
        >⚠ Suspended</span>
      </span>
    </div>
    <span class="result-badge" *ngIf="!isIneligible(tp)">Select</span>
    <span
      class="result-badge"
      *ngIf="isIneligible(tp)"
      style="background:#fff0f0;color:#e74c3c"
    >Ineligible</span>
  </div>
</div>


<div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
  <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
  No taxpayer found. Try a different TIN, NID, or name.
</div>


<div class="selected-card" *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer">
  <div class="selected-card-left">
    <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-person-check-fill"></i></div>
    <div>
      <p class="selected-name">{{ displayName }}</p>
      <p class="selected-meta">
        <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber">TIN: {{ selectedTaxpayer.tinNumber }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="selectedTaxpayer.phone"> · {{ selectedTaxpayer.phone }}</span>
        <span class="ms-2" style="font-size:11px;opacity:0.8">
          — {{ selectedTaxpayer.taxpayerType?.typeName }}
        </span>
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="autofill-tag">
    <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Selected
  </div>
</div>
```

```html
<div class="picker-section">

  <div class="section-header">
    <div class="section-icon search-icon">
      <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    </div>
    <div>
      <h6 class="section-title">Find VAT Registration</h6>
      <span class="section-sub">
        Search by BIN number, TIN or business name — only Active registrations shown
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>


  <ng-container *ngIf="!isSelected">

    <div class="search-row">
      <div class="input-wrap search-input-wrap">
        <i class="bi bi-hash input-icon"></i>
        <input
          type="text"
          class="form-input"
          placeholder="Enter BIN number, TIN or business name..."
          [(ngModel)]="searchQuery"
          [ngModelOptions]="{ standalone: true }"
          (ngModelChange)="onSearchInput()"
          (keyup.enter)="search()" />
      </div>

      <button type="button" class="btn-search"
        (click)="search()"
        [disabled]="isSearching">
        <span *ngIf="!isSearching"><i class="bi bi-search"></i> Search</span>
        <span *ngIf="isSearching">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm"></span> Searching...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>


    <div class="search-results" *ngIf="searchResults.length > 0">
      <div class="result-item" *ngFor="let r of searchResults" (click)="select(r)">
        <div class="result-avatar"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div class="result-info">
          <span class="result-name">{{ r.businessName }}</span>
          <span class="result-meta">
            <span class="fw-bold text-blue me-2">BIN: {{ r.binNo }}</span>
            <span class="me-2">TIN: {{ r.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span class="cat-pill">{{ r.vatCategory }}</span>
          </span>
        </div>
        <span class="result-badge">Select</span>
      </div>
    </div>


    <div class="no-result-note" *ngIf="hasSearched && searchResults.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i>
      No active VAT registration found. Check BIN, TIN or name and try again.
    </div>

  </ng-container>


  <ng-container *ngIf="isSelected && selectedReg">

    <div class="selected-card">
      <div class="selected-card-left">
        <div class="selected-avatar"><i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i></div>
        <div>
          <p class="selected-name">{{ selectedReg.businessName }}</p>
          <p class="selected-meta">
            BIN: {{ selectedReg.binNo }}
            <span class="ms-2">TIN: {{ selectedReg.tinNumber }}</span>
            <span class="ms-2 cat-pill">{{ selectedReg.vatCategory }}</span>
            <span class="ms-2 zone-pill">{{ selectedReg.vatZone }}</span>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="selected-card-right">
        <div class="autofill-tag">
          <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge-fill"></i> Selected
        </div>
        <button type="button" class="btn-change" (click)="clear()">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i> Change
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

  </ng-container>

</div>
```

## File: src/app/layout/sidebar/sidebar.component.html
```html
<div class="sidebar" [class.collapsed]="isCollapsed">


  <div class="sidebar-logo">
    <div class="logo-icon">
      <i class="bi bi-bank2"></i>
    </div>

    <div class="logo-text" *ngIf="!isCollapsed">
      <span class="logo-title">VAT & TAX</span>
      <span class="logo-sub">Management System</span>
    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="sidebar-scroll">
    <nav class="sidebar-nav">
      <ng-container *ngFor="let item of visibleMenuItems">


        <div class="nav-group-header" *ngIf="item.isGroupHeader && !isCollapsed">
          {{ item.label }}
        </div>

        <div class="nav-group-divider" *ngIf="item.isGroupHeader && isCollapsed"></div>


        <a
          *ngIf="!item.isGroupHeader && !item.children && !isCollapsed"
          class="nav-item"
          [class.active]="isActive(item.route)"
          (click)="navigate(item.route!)"
        >
          <i [class]="item.icon + ' nav-icon'"></i>
          <span class="nav-label">{{ item.label }}</span>
        </a>


        <div
          *ngIf="!item.isGroupHeader && item.children && !isCollapsed"
          class="nav-parent-wrap"
        >
          <div
            class="nav-item nav-parent"
            [class.active-parent]="isParentActive(item)"
            [class.expanded]="isExpanded(item.label)"
            (click)="toggleExpand(item.label)"
          >
            <i [class]="item.icon + ' nav-icon'"></i>
            <span class="nav-label">{{ item.label }}</span>
            <i
              class="bi bi-chevron-down nav-arrow"
              [class.rotated]="isExpanded(item.label)"
            ></i>
          </div>

          <div class="nav-children" [class.open]="isExpanded(item.label)">
            <a
              *ngFor="let child of item.children"
              class="nav-child"
              [class.active]="isActive(child.route)"
              (click)="navigate(child.route!, $event)"
            >
              <i *ngIf="child.icon" [class]="child.icon + ' child-icon'"></i>
              <span>{{ child.label }}</span>
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>


        <div
          *ngIf="!item.isGroupHeader && (!item.children || item.children.length === 0) && isCollapsed"
          class="nav-flyout-wrap"
        >
          <div
            class="nav-item collapsed-item"
            [class.active]="isActive(item.route)"
            (click)="navigate(item.route!)"
            [title]="item.label"
          >
            <i [class]="item.icon + ' nav-icon'"></i>
          </div>
        </div>


        <div
          *ngIf="!item.isGroupHeader && item.children && item.children.length > 0 && isCollapsed"
          class="collapsed-parent-block"
        >
          <div
            class="nav-item collapsed-item"
            [class.active-parent]="isParentActive(item)"
            [title]="item.label"
            (click)="toggleExpand(item.label)"
          >
            <i [class]="item.icon + ' nav-icon'"></i>
          </div>

          <div class="collapsed-children" [class.open]="isExpanded(item.label)">
            <a
              *ngFor="let child of item.children"
              class="collapsed-child-item"
              [class.active]="isActive(child.route)"
              (click)="navigate(child.route!, $event)"
              [title]="child.label"
            >
              <i *ngIf="child.icon" [class]="child.icon + ' collapsed-child-icon'"></i>
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>

      </ng-container>
    </nav>
  </div>


  <div class="sidebar-footer" *ngIf="!isCollapsed">
    <div class="sf-secure">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-lock-fill"></i>
      <span>Secure Government Portal</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sf-version">v2.0.0 • FY 2025–26</div>
  </div>

</div>
```

```html
    </div>

  </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
