```html
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">TIN Number</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-upc-scan input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.tinNumber" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Taxpayer Name</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxpayerName" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Return Reference</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text input-icon"></i>
          <input type="text" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.returnReference"
            placeholder="e.g. ITR-2024-001234" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Fiscal Year</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.fiscalYear">
            <option value="">— Select —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let y of assessmentYears" [value]="y">{{ y }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>


  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon cyan">
        <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-check"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Audit Details</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Type, priority, dates and status</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Audit Type</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-tag-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.auditType">
            <option *ngFor="let t of auditTypes" [value]="t">{{ t }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Priority</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-speedometer2 input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.priority">
            <option *ngFor="let p of priorities" [value]="p">{{ p }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Status</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-toggle-on input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.status">
            <option *ngFor="let s of statuses" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label required">Scheduled Date</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar3 input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.scheduledDate" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Period From</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxPeriodStart" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Tax Period To</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-calendar2-check input-icon"></i>
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [(ngModel)]="form.taxPeriodEnd" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>


  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon amber">
        <i class="bi bi-person-gear"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Assignment</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Auditor and supervisor details</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Assigned Officer</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.assignedOfficerName">
            <option value="">— Select Officer —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let a of auditors" [value]="a">{{ a }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Supervisor</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-check input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" [(ngModel)]="form.supervisorName">
            <option value="">— Select Supervisor —</option>
            <option *ngFor="let s of supervisors" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>


  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon green">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Internal notes or additional comments</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea" [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="3"
            placeholder="Internal notes, context, or special instructions..."></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()" [disabled]="isSaving || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Audit</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span> Updating...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

```html
      <div class="ahc-icon"><i class="bi bi-search"></i></div>

          </span>

          </span>

  </div>

    </button>
  </div>


  <div class="audit-tabs-wrapper">

      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='queries'" (click)="setTab('queries'); loadQueries()">

        <span class="atab-badge" *ngIf="auditCase.openQueryCount > 0">{{ auditCase.openQueryCount }}</span>
      </button>

        <i class="bi bi-folder2-open"></i> Documents
      </button>

        <i class="bi bi-search"></i> Findings
        <span class="atab-badge warn" *ngIf="auditCase.findingCount > 0">{{ auditCase.findingCount }}</span>
      </button>
      <button class="atab" [class.active]="activeTab==='assessment'" (click)="setTab('assessment'); loadAssessment()">
        <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Assessment

        <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i> Timeline
      </button>
    </div>


    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='overview'">
      <div class="details-grid">

            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

            <i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i> Propose Assessment
          </button>
          <button class="btn-search" style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;background:#e65100;" *ngIf="canApproveAssessment()" (click)="openApprovalModal()">
            <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i> Approve
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <ng-container *ngIf="assessment; else noAssessment">
        <div class="detail-card">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-calculator-fill"></i><span>Assessment Summary</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Assessment No</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="code-badge">{{ assessment.assessmentNo }}</span></span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Additional Tax</span><span class="detail-value">{{ assessment.additionalTax | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Penalty</span><span class="detail-value">{{ assessment.penaltyAmount | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Interest</span><span class="detail-value">{{ assessment.interestAmount | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Total Demand</span><span class="detail-value fw-bold text-danger">{{ assessment.totalDemand | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-label">Status</span><span class="detail-value"><span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(assessment.status)">{{ assessment.status }}</span></span></div>
            <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="assessment.paymentDeadline"><span class="detail-label">Pay By</span><span class="detail-value due-overdue">{{ assessment.paymentDeadline | date:'mediumDate' }}</span></div>
            <div class="detail-row" *ngIf="assessment.approvedBy"><span class="detail-label">Approved By</span><span class="detail-value">{{ assessment.approvedBy }}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>
      <ng-template #noAssessment>
        <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-calculator"></i><p>No assessment proposed yet.</p></div>
      </ng-template>
    </div>


    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='demand'">
      <ng-container *ngIf="demandNotice; else noDemand">
        <div class="demand-banner">
          <div class="db-left">
            <div class="db-badge">DEMAND NOTICE</div>
            <div class="db-no">{{ demandNotice.demandNo }}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="db-amount">
            <label>Total Amount Due</label>
            <div class="db-amount-val">{{ demandNotice.amountDue | number:'1.2-2' }} BDT</div>
            <div class="db-due" [class.due-overdue]="isDue(demandNotice.dueDate)">
              Pay by: {{ demandNotice.dueDate | date:'mediumDate' }}
            </div>
          </div>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(demandNotice.status)">{{ demandNotice.status }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card mt-3">
          <div class="detail-card-header"><i class="bi bi-bank"></i><span>Payment Instructions</span></div>
          <div class="detail-body">
            <div class="detail-row"><span class="detail-value" style="text-align:left;">{{ demandNotice.paymentInstructions }}</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ng-container>
      <ng-template #noDemand>
        <div class="empty-state"><i class="bi bi-receipt"></i><p>Demand notice not issued yet.</p></div>
      </ng-template>
    </div>


    <div class="atab-content" *ngIf="activeTab==='timeline'">
      <div class="timeline-list">
        <div class="timeline-row" *ngFor="let h of auditCase.statusHistory; let last = last">
          <div class="tl-line-wrap">
            <div class="tl-dot"></div>
            <div class="tl-line" *ngIf="!last"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-content">
            <div class="tl-header">
              <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(h.toStatus)">{{ getStatusLabel(h.toStatus) }}</span>
              <span class="tl-time">{{ h.changedAt | date:'medium' }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tl-by"><i class="bi bi-person-fill"></i> {{ h.changedBy }}
              <span class="text-muted ms-1" *ngIf="h.changedByRole">({{ h.changedByRole }})</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tl-reason" *ngIf="h.changeReason">{{ h.changeReason }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="!auditCase.statusHistory.length">
          <i class="bi bi-clock-history"></i><p>No status history yet.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</ng-container>


<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showQueryModal">
  <div class="modal-card wide">
```

```html
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Number of Employees</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-people-fill input-icon"></i>
          <input type="number" class="form-input"
            placeholder="0"
            [(ngModel)]="form.numberOfEmployees" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            placeholder="Optional remarks..."
            [(ngModel)]="form.remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
      <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" (click)="onSubmit()"
      [disabled]="isLoading || !isFormValid()">
      <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-building-fill"></i> Register Business
      </span>
      <span *ngIf="isLoading">
        <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Registering...
      </span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
```

```html
          <input type="date" class="form-input" [value]="payment.valueDate | date:'yyyy-MM-dd'" readonly />
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>

      </span>

</div>
```

```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
```

```html
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search by penalty no, TIN, taxpayer, type..." [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button *canDo="'export'" class="btn-export">
        <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
        <span>Export</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="status-filter-row">
    <button *ngFor="let f of statusFilters" class="filter-pill" [class.active]="activeStatus === f.value"
      (click)="filterByStatus(f.value)">
      {{ f.label }}
    </button>
  </div>


  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading penalties...</span>
  </div>


  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Penalty No</th>
          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Type</th>
          <th>Severity</th>
          <th>Penalty</th>
          <th>Interest</th>
          <th>Total</th>
          <th>Issue Date</th>
          <th>Due Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let p of filteredPenalties; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="penalty-code">{{ p.penaltyNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">{{ p.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ p.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ p.tinNumber }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(p.penaltyType)">
              {{ p.penaltyType }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(p.severity)">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i>
              {{ p.severity }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell penalty-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(p.penaltyAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell interest-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(p.interestAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td class="amount-cell total-amount">
            {{ formatCurrency(p.totalAmount) }}
          </td>

          <td>{{ p.issueDate }}</td>

          <td>
            <span [class]="p.status === 'Overdue' ? 'due-overdue' : 'due-normal'">
              {{ p.dueDate }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">
              {{ p.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewPenalty(p.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="editPenalty(p.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filteredPenalties.length === 0">
          <td colspan="12">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
              <p>No penalties found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>


  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding: 12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let p of filteredPenalties">

      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar">{{ p.taxpayerName.charAt(0) }}</div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ p.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ p.penaltyNo }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">
          {{ p.status }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>TIN</label>
          <span>{{ p.tinNumber }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Type</label>
          <span class="type-badge" [ngClass]="getTypeClass(p.penaltyType)">
            {{ p.penaltyType }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Severity</label>
          <span class="sev-badge" [ngClass]="getSeverityClass(p.severity)">
            {{ p.severity }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Penalty</label>
          <span class="penalty-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.penaltyAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Interest</label>
          <span class="interest-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.interestAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Total</label>
          <span class="total-amount">{{ formatCurrency(p.totalAmount) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Issue Date</label>
          <span>{{ p.issueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Due Date</label>
          <span [class]="p.status === 'Overdue' ? 'due-overdue' : 'due-normal'">
            {{ p.dueDate | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="p.description">
          <label>Description</label>
          <span>{{ p.description }}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="viewPenalty(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="editPenalty(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN', 'TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
        </button>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredPenalties.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle"></i>
      <p>No penalties found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>


<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/penalties/create" title="Issue Penalty">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Penalty?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this penalty record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```html
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      </div>

          <i class="bi bi-paperclip me-2"></i> Documents ({{ refund.documents.length }} uploaded)
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <div *ngIf="!refund.documents.length" class="text-muted small">No documents uploaded.</div>
          <div
            *ngFor="let doc of refund.documents"
            class="doc-item"
          >
            <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf text-danger fs-5 flex-shrink-0" aria-hidden="true"></i>
            <div class="flex-grow-1">
              <div class="small fw-semibold">{{ doc.documentName }}</div>
              <div class="text-muted" style="font-size:.72rem">
                {{ doc.documentType | titlecase }} ·
                Uploaded {{ doc.uploadedAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy' }}
              </div>
            </div>
            <span
              class="badge"
              [class.bg-success]="doc.verificationStatus === 'VERIFIED'"
              [class.bg-danger]="doc.verificationStatus === 'REJECTED'"
              [class.bg-secondary]="doc.verificationStatus === 'PENDING'"
            >{{ doc.verificationStatus | titlecase }}</span>
            <button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm py-0 px-2 ms-2"
              (click)="downloadDocument(doc.id)" title="Download">
              <i class="bi bi-download"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>


    <div class="col-lg-4">
      <div class="detail-card sticky-top" style="top:80px">
        <div class="detail-card-header">
          <i class="bi bi-clock-history me-2"></i> Status Timeline
        </div>
        <div class="detail-card-body">
          <app-refund-status-timeline [history]="refund.statusHistory">
          </app-refund-status-timeline>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

```typescript
export type AccountCategory = 'Individual' | 'Business' | 'Organization';
⋮----
export interface RegistrationState {

  accountCategory:  AccountCategory | null;
  taxpayerTypeId:   number | null;
  taxpayerTypeName: string;


  fullName:        string;
  email:           string;
  phone:           string;
  password:        string;
  confirmPassword: string;


  nid:             string;
  dateOfBirth:     string;
  gender:          string;
  profession:      string;


  hasExistingTin:  boolean;
  existingTin:     string;


  companyName:          string;
  rjscNo:               string;
  incorporationDate:    string;
  natureOfBusiness:     string;
  authorizedPersonName: string;
  authorizedPersonNid:  string;
}
⋮----
export function emptyState(): RegistrationState
⋮----
export interface UserRegistrationRequest {
  taxpayerTypeId:  number;
  accountCategory: AccountCategory;
  fullName:        string;
  email:           string;
  phone:           string;
  password:        string;

  existingTin?:    string;


  nid?:         string;
  dateOfBirth?: string;
  gender?:      string;
  profession?:  string;


  companyName?:          string;
  rjscNo?:               string;
  incorporationDate?:    string;
  natureOfBusiness?:     string;
  authorizedPersonName?: string;
  authorizedPersonNid?:  string;
}
⋮----

  userId:           number;

  tinNumber:        string;
  fullName:         string;
  email:            string;

}
```

## File: src/app/models/tax-structure.model.ts
```typescript
export type TaxStructureStatus = 'Active' | 'Inactive' | 'Expired';
export type TaxType =
  | 'VAT'
  | 'AIT'
  | 'Import Duty'
  | 'Income Tax'
  | 'Excise Duty'
  | 'Supplementary Duty'
  | 'Other';
export type ApplicableTo =
  | 'All'
  | 'Individual'
  | 'Company'
  | 'Import'
  | 'Export'
  | 'Service'
  | 'Goods';
export type RateType = 'FLAT' | 'SLAB';
⋮----
export interface TaxSlab {
  id?: number;
  minAmount: number;
  maxAmount?: number | null;
  rate: number;
  label?: string;
  sortOrder?: number;
}
⋮----
export interface TaxStructure {
  id: number;
  taxCode: string;
  taxName: string;
  taxType: TaxType;
  rateType: RateType;
  rate: number;
  slabs: TaxSlab[];
  applicableTo: ApplicableTo;
  effectiveDate: string;
  expiryDate: string;
  description: string;
  status: TaxStructureStatus;
  createdBy: string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedBy?: string;
  updatedAt?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface TaxStructureCreateRequest {
  taxCode: string;
  taxName: string;
  taxType: TaxType;
  rateType: RateType;
  rate: number;
  slabs: TaxSlab[];
  applicableTo: ApplicableTo;
  effectiveDate: string;
  expiryDate: string;
  description: string;
  status: TaxStructureStatus;
}
⋮----
export interface TaxStructureUpdateRequest extends TaxStructureCreateRequest {}
⋮----
export interface TaxMasterData {
  taxTypes: string[];
  applicables: string[];
  statuses: string[];
  rateTypes: Array<{ value: RateType; label: string }>;
}
⋮----
export interface PreviewSlabBreakdown {
  slabMin: number;
  slabMax: number | null;
  slabRate: number;
  taxableInSlab: number;
  taxInSlab: number;
  label?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface TaxPreviewResponse {
  taxableAmount: number;
  rateType: RateType;
  taxAmount: number;
  effectiveRate: number;
  breakdown: PreviewSlabBreakdown[];
}
⋮----
export interface TaxPreviewRequest {
  amount: number;
  rateType: RateType;
  rate: number;
  slabs: TaxSlab[];
}
```

```html
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary"></div>
    <span>Loading products...</span>
  </div>


  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>
          <th>Code</th>
          <th>Product</th>
          <th>HS Code</th>
          <th>Category</th>
          <th>Tax Type</th>
          <th>Tax Rate</th>
          <th>Unit</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let p of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>
          <td><span class="prod-code">{{ p.productCode }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar">
                <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(p.category)"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ p.productName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ (p.description || '') | slice:0:35 }}{{ (p.description?.length ?? 0) > 35 ? '...' : '' }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>
          <td><span class="hs-code">{{ p.hsCode }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="cat-pill">
              <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(p.category)"></i>
              {{ p.category }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td><span class="tax-type-badge">{{ p.taxType }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="rate-chip" [class.zero-rate]="p.taxRate === 0">
              {{ p.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero' : p.taxRate + '%' }}
            </span>
          </td>
          <td><span class="unit-badge">{{ p.unit }}</span></td>
          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">{{ p.status }}</span>
          </td>
          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(p.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(p.id)"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)"><i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i></button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="10">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i>
              <p>No products found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>


  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let p of filtered">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar"><i [class]="getCategoryIcon(p.category)"></i></div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ p.productName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ p.hsCode }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(p.status)">{{ p.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Category</label><span>{{ p.category }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Type</label><span>{{ p.taxType }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field">
          <label>Tax Rate</label>
          <span class="rate-chip" [class.zero-rate]="p.taxRate === 0">
            {{ p.taxRate === 0 ? 'Zero Rated' : p.taxRate + '%' }}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Unit</label><span>{{ p.unit }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
        </button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(p.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i><p>No products found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/taxable-products/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>
```

```html
      <div class="ts-divider"></div>

        <span class="ts-label total">Net Tax Payable</span>
        <span class="ts-value total">৳{{ netTaxPayable.toLocaleString() }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="section-divider"></div>


  <div class="form-section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-icon orange">
        <i class="bi bi-chat-text-fill"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h6 class="section-title">Submission & Remarks</h6>
        <span class="section-sub">Submitted by and notes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Submitted By</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-person-fill input-icon"></i>
          <select class="form-input form-select" formControlName="submittedBy">
            <option *ngFor="let s of submitters" [value]="s">{{ s }}</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group full-width">
        <label class="form-label">Remarks</label>
        <div class="input-wrap">
          <i class="bi bi-pencil-square input-icon textarea-icon"></i>
          <textarea class="form-input form-textarea"
            formControlName="remarks" rows="2"></textarea>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="form-actions">
    <button class="btn-cancel" (click)="onCancel()" [disabled]="isSaving">
      <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
    </button>
    <button class="btn-submit" type="submit"
      [disabled]="isSaving || form.invalid">
      <span *ngIf="!isSaving"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Update Return</span>
      <span *ngIf="isSaving"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Updating...</span>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
</form>
```

```typescript
  | 'Rejected'
  | 'Overdue'
  | 'Under Review'
  | 'Amended'
  | 'Send Back';
```

```typescript
export type PenaltyStatus =
  | 'DRAFT' | 'PENDING_APPROVAL' | 'APPROVED' | 'ISSUED'
  | 'PARTIALLY_PAID' | 'PAID' | 'APPEALED' | 'CANCELLED' | 'CLOSED'

export type PenaltyType =
  | 'Late Filing' | 'Late Payment' | 'Non-Compliance'
  | 'Fraud' | 'Underpayment' | 'Other';
⋮----

  id: number;

  fromStatus: string | null;
  toStatus: string | null;

  tinNumber: string;

  totalAmount: number;

  assessmentYear: string;

  issuedBy: string;
  approvedBy: string;
  description: string;
  remarks: string;
  createdAt: string;

  approvedAt: string | null;
  issuedAt: string | null;
```

```html
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-left">
    <h4>Income Tax Returns</h4>
    <p>Manage and process all income tax return filings.</p>
  </div>
  <a *canDo="'create'" routerLink="/income-tax-returns/create"
     class="btn-add-primary desktop-add-btn">
    <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> File Return
  </a>
</div>

<div class="page-wrapper">


  <div class="status-tabs">
    <button class="stab"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === ''"
      (click)="filterStatus = ''">
      All <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab submitted"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Submitted'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Submitted'">
      Submitted <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Submitted') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab review"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Under Review'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Under Review'">
      Under Review <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Under Review') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab accepted"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Accepted'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Accepted'">
      Accepted <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Accepted') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab rejected"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Rejected'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Rejected'">
      Rejected <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Rejected') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab draft"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Draft'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Draft'">
      Draft <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Draft') }}</span>
    </button>
    <button class="stab overdue"
      [class.active]="filterStatus === 'Overdue'"
      (click)="filterStatus = 'Overdue'">
      Overdue <span class="stab-count">{{ countByStatus('Overdue') }}</span>
    </button>
  </div>


  <div class="list-search-bar">
    <div class="search-field-row">

          [(ngModel)]="searchTerm" />
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-export" (click)="onExport()" [disabled]="isExporting">
        <i class="bi" [ngClass]="isExporting ? 'bi-hourglass-split spin' : 'bi-file-earmark-excel'"></i>
        {{ isExporting ? 'Exporting...' : 'Export to CSV' }}
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="loading-row" *ngIf="isLoading">
    <div class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm" style="color:#7c3aed"></div>
    <span>Loading income tax returns...</span>
  </div>


  <div class="table-responsive desktop-table" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <table class="data-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>#</th>

          <th>Taxpayer</th>
          <th>Category</th>

          <th>Taxable Income</th>

          <th>Net Payable</th>
          <th>Tax Paid</th>

          <th>Due Date</th>
          <th>Status</th>
          <th>Actions</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr *ngFor="let r of filtered; let i = index">
          <td>{{ i + 1 }}</td>

          <td><span class="return-code">{{ r.returnNo }}</span></td>

          <td>
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar itr-avatar">
                <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
              </div>

              </div>
            </div>

              {{ r.itrCategory }}
            </span>

              <span class="income-year">{{ r.incomeYear }}</span>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td class="amt-cell">{{ formatCurrency(taxableIncomeOf(r)) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell gross">{{ formatCurrency(r.grossTax) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell net">{{ formatCurrency(netPayableOf(r)) }}</td>
          <td class="amt-cell paid">{{ formatCurrency(r.taxPaid) }}</td>

          <td>
            <span *ngIf="refundableOf(r) > 0" class="refund-badge">
              {{ formatCurrency(refundableOf(r)) }}
            </span>
            <span *ngIf="refundableOf(r) === 0" class="text-muted">-</span>
          </td>

          <td>{{ r.dueDate }}</td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(r.status)">
              {{ r.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'"
                class="btn-edit"
                [disabled]="r.status === 'Accepted' || r.status === 'Under Review'"
                (click)="edit(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
                class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>

        <tr *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
          <td colspan="13">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i>
              <p>No income tax returns found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>


  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">

      </div>

        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Category</label>
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(r.itrCategory)">{{ r.itrCategory }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Assessment Year</label><span>{{ r.assessmentYear }}</span></div>

        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Net Payable</label><span class="net">{{ formatCurrency(netPayableOf(r)) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Paid</label><span class="paid">{{ formatCurrency(r.taxPaid) }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="refundableOf(r) > 0">
          <label>Refundable</label>
          <span class="refund-badge">{{ formatCurrency(refundableOf(r)) }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Due Date</label><span>{{ r.dueDate }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
        </button>
        <ng-container *ngIf="r.status === 'Draft' || r.status === 'Send Back'">
          <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(r.id)">
            <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
          </button>
        </ng-container>

        <ng-container *ngIf="r.status === 'Rejected'">
          <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-amend" (click)="edit(r.id)">
            <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i> Amend
          </button>
        </ng-container>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']"
          class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(r.id)">
          <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filtered.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-receipt-cutoff"></i><p>No income tax returns found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" routerLink="/income-tax-returns/create">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>


<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete Income Tax Return?</p>
      <p class="modal-msg">
        This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this return record?
      </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```typescript
import { Component, OnInit, inject } from '@angular/core';
import { ToastService } from 'src/app/shared/toast/toast.service';

⋮----
```

```html
           (click)="toggleDropdown()"
           [class.open]="showDropdown">

        <div class="user-avatar-ring">
          <img *ngIf="currentUser?.photoUrl"
               [src]="photoUrl"
               class="user-photo"/>
          <div *ngIf="!currentUser?.photoUrl" class="user-monogram">
            {{ currentUser?.fullName?.charAt(0) | uppercase }}
          </div>
          <div class="online-dot"></div>
        </div>

          <span class="user-name">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</span>
          <span class="user-role">{{ currentUser?.taxpayerType }}</span>
        </div>

          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none">
            <path d="M2 4L6 8L10 4" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)"
                  stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>


        <div class="user-dropdown" *ngIf="showDropdown" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
          <div class="dropdown-profile">
            <div class="dp-avatar">
              <img *ngIf="currentUser?.photoUrl" [src]="currentUser!.photoUrl" class="dp-photo"/>
              <div *ngIf="!currentUser?.photoUrl" class="dp-monogram">
                {{ currentUser?.fullName?.charAt(0) | uppercase }}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="dp-info">
              <div class="dp-name">{{ currentUser?.fullName }}</div>
              <div class="dp-email">{{ currentUser?.email }}</div>
              <span class="dp-badge">{{ currentUser?.taxpayerType }}</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="dropdown-body">
            <a class="dd-item" routerLink="/my-portal" (click)="showDropdown = false">
              <div class="dd-icon">
                <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                  <rect x="1" y="1" width="6" height="6" rx="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                  <rect x="9" y="1" width="6" height="6" rx="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                  <rect x="1" y="9" width="6" height="6" rx="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                  <rect x="9" y="9" width="6" height="6" rx="1.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <span>My Portal</span>
            </a>

            <div class="dd-divider"></div>

            <button class="dd-item danger" (click)="logout()">
              <div class="dd-icon">
                <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none">
                  <path d="M6 2H3a1 1 0 00-1 1v10a1 1 0 001 1h3M10 11l3-3-3-3M13 8H6"
                        stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
                </svg>
              </div>
              <span>Sign out</span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>


  <nav class="portal-breadcrumb" *ngIf="currentPageTitle">
    <a routerLink="/my-portal" class="breadcrumb-home">
      <i class="bi bi-house-fill"></i>
      <span>My Portal</span>
    </a>
    <i class="bi bi-chevron-right breadcrumb-sep"></i>
    <span class="breadcrumb-current">{{ currentPageTitle }}</span>
  </nav>


  <main class="portal-main">
    <div class="portal-container">
      <router-outlet></router-outlet>
    </div>
  </main>


  <footer class="portal-footer">
    <span>© {{ currentYear }} National Board of Revenue, Bangladesh</span>
    <span class="footer-sep">·</span>
    <span>Secure Government Portal</span>
```

```html
            <div class="td-name">
              <div class="td-avatar tin-avatar">
                <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(t.tinCategory)"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <span class="td-title">{{ t.taxpayerName }}</span>
                <span class="td-sub">{{ t.email || t.phone }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(t.tinCategory)">
              <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(t.tinCategory)"></i>
              {{ t.tinCategory }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <span class="code-sm" *ngIf="t.nid">{{ t.nid }}</span>
            <span class="code-sm" *ngIf="!t.nid && t.passportNo">{{ t.passportNo }}</span>
            <span class="code-sm" *ngIf="!t.nid && !t.passportNo && t.incorporationDate">Inc: {{ t.incorporationDate |
              date:'shortDate' }}</span>
            <span class="text-muted" *ngIf="!t.nid && !t.passportNo && !t.incorporationDate">—</span>
          </td>

          <td><span class="zone-badge">{{ t.taxZone }}</span></td>
          <td><span class="circle-badge">{{ t.taxCircle }}</span></td>
          <td>{{ t.district }}</td>
          <td>{{ t.issuedDate | date:'mediumDate' }}</td>

          <td>
            <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(t.status)">
              {{ t.status }}
            </span>
          </td>

          <td>
            <div class="action-btns">
              <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View
              </button>
              <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit
              </button>
              <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(t.id)">
                <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr *ngIf="filteredTins.length === 0">
          <td colspan="11">
            <div class="empty-state">
              <i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i>
              <p>No TIN records found.</p>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>

  <div class="mobile-cards" style="padding:12px;" *ngIf="!isLoading">
    <div class="mobile-card" *ngFor="let t of filteredTins">
      <div class="mobile-card-header">
        <div class="mobile-card-title">
          <div class="mobile-avatar tin-avatar">
            <i [class]="getCategoryIcon(t.tinCategory)"></i>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="mobile-name">{{ t.taxpayerName }}</div>
            <div class="mobile-sub">{{ t.tinNumber }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(t.status)">{{ t.status }}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-body">
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Category</label>
          <span class="cat-badge" [ngClass]="getCategoryClass(t.tinCategory)">{{ t.tinCategory }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="t.nid"><label>NID</label><span>{{ t.nid }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field" *ngIf="!t.nid && t.incorporationDate"><label>Inc. Date</label><span>{{
            t.incorporationDate | date:'shortDate' }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Zone</label><span>{{ t.taxZone }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Tax Circle</label><span>{{ t.taxCircle }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>District</label><span>{{ t.district }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Phone</label><span>{{ t.phone }}</span></div>
        <div class="mobile-field"><label>Issued</label><span>{{ t.issuedDate | date:'mediumDate' }}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="mobile-card-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" (click)="view(t.id)"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> View</button>
        <button *canDo="'edit'" class="btn-edit" (click)="edit(t.id)"><i class="bi bi-pencil-fill"></i> Edit</button>
        <button *hasRole="['SUPER_ADMIN','TAX_COMMISSIONER']" class="btn-delete" (click)="confirmDelete(t.id)"><i
            class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="empty-state" *ngIf="filteredTins.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-upc-scan"></i>
      <p>No TIN records found.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<button *canDo="'create'" class="fab-btn" (click)="navigateToCreate()">
  <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i>
</button>

<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showDeleteModal">
  <div class="modal-card">
    <div class="modal-accent error"></div>
    <div class="modal-icon-wrap error">
      <i class="bi bi-trash-fill" style="color:#A32D2D; font-size:22px;"></i>
    </div>
    <p class="modal-title">Delete TIN Record?</p>
    <p class="modal-msg">
      This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this TIN record?
    </p>
    <div class="modal-actions">
      <button class="btn-modal-cancel" (click)="cancelDelete()">Cancel</button>
      <button class="btn-modal-confirm error" (click)="confirmDeleteExecute()">
        <i class="bi bi-trash-fill"></i> Delete
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```html
<div class="page-header">
```

```html
<div class="wizard-steps">
  <div class="wizard-step" [class.active]="currentStep === 1" [class.done]="currentStep > 1">
    <div class="ws-circle">
      <i class="bi bi-check-lg" *ngIf="currentStep > 1"></i>
      <span *ngIf="currentStep <= 1">1</span>
    </div>
    <span class="ws-label">Taxpayer</span>
  </div>
  <div class="wizard-connector" [class.done]="currentStep > 1"></div>

  <div class="wizard-step"
       [class.active]="currentStep === 2" [class.done]="currentStep > 2"
       [class.skipped]="isCompany && currentStep > 1">
    <div class="ws-circle">
      <i class="bi bi-check-lg"          *ngIf="currentStep > 2"></i>
      <i class="bi bi-skip-forward-fill" *ngIf="isCompany && currentStep > 1 && currentStep <= 2"></i>
      <span *ngIf="currentStep <= 2 && !isCompany">2</span>
      <span *ngIf="isCompany && currentStep === 1">2</span>
    </div>
    <span class="ws-label">{{ isCompany && currentStep > 1 ? 'Skipped' : 'Business' }}</span>

        </div>

      <div class="section-divider"></div>

          </div>
        </div>


        <div class="form-group full-width" style="margin-bottom:16px;">
          <label class="form-label required">VAT Category</label>
          <div class="radio-group" role="radiogroup">
            <label class="radio-opt" *ngFor="let cat of vatCategoryOptions"
              [class.selected]="ctrl('vatCategory')?.value === cat.value">
              <input type="radio" class="radio-input-hidden" formControlName="vatCategory" [value]="cat.value" />
              <div class="radio-dot"><div class="radio-dot-inner"></div></div>
              <span class="radio-opt-label">{{ cat.label }}</span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <span class="field-error-msg" *ngIf="ctrl('vatCategory')?.errors?.['required'] && ctrl('vatCategory')?.touched">VAT category is required.</span>

                </span>

              </div>

                </span>

                  <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
                </button>
              </ng-container>

                  accept=".pdf,.jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp"
                  (change)="onFileSelected($event, doc.key)" />
              </label>

            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-divider"></div>


      <div class="form-section">

            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        </button>

          <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
        </button>

          style="border-color:var(--color-border-primary);color:var(--color-accent)">
          <i class="bi bi-arrow-left"></i> Back
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="btn-submit"
          (click)="onOpenReview()" [disabled]="isLoading || !canSubmit">
          <span *ngIf="!isLoading"><i class="bi bi-eye-fill"></i> Review &amp; Submit</span>
          <span *ngIf="isLoading">
            <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Registering…
          </span>
        </button>
      </div>

    </form>
  </ng-container>

</div>
```

```html
<div class="page-header">

      </div>
    </div>

      </div>
    </div>

          </div>

        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="no-history" *ngIf="!vr.actionHistory || vr.actionHistory.length === 0">
      <i class="bi bi-clock"></i>
      <p>No action history yet</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</ng-container>


<div class="modal-overlay" *ngIf="showActionModal" (click)="closeModal()">
  <div class="action-modal" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">

    <div class="am-header" [ngClass]="'am-' + currentAction.toLowerCase().replace(' ','-')">
      <div class="am-icon">
        <i [class]="
          currentAction === 'Submit'       ? 'bi bi-send-fill'           :
          currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'bi bi-search'              :
          currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill'   :
          currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'       :
                                             'bi bi-arrow-return-left'
        "></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="am-title">{{ currentAction }} Return</div>
        <div class="am-sub">{{ vr?.returnNo }} — {{ vr?.businessName }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="am-body">

      <div class="am-info">
        <div class="am-info-row">
          <span>Current Status</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(vr?.status || '')">{{ vr?.status }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="am-info-row">
          <span>New Status</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(
            currentAction === 'Submit'       ? 'Submitted'    :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Under Review' :
            currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'Accepted'     :
            currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'Rejected'     : 'Send Back'
          )">
            {{
            currentAction === 'Submit' ? 'Submitted' :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Under Review' :
            currentAction === 'Accept' ? 'Accepted' :
            currentAction === 'Reject' ? 'Rejected' : 'Send Back'
            }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="am-remarks-wrap">
        <label class="am-label">
          Remarks
          <span class="required-star" *ngIf="currentAction === 'Reject' || currentAction === 'Send Back'">
            * Required
          </span>
        </label>
        <textarea class="am-remarks" [placeholder]="
            currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'Optional remarks...'                            :
            currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'Required — reason for rejection...'             :
            currentAction === 'Send Back'    ? 'Required — what needs to be corrected...'       :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Optional — any initial observations...'         :
                                               'Optional remarks...'
          " [(ngModel)]="actionRemarks" rows="3">
        </textarea>
        <div class="am-error" *ngIf="actionError">
          <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ actionError }}
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="am-footer">
      <button class="am-btn-cancel" (click)="closeModal()" [disabled]="isActing">
        Cancel
      </button>
      <button class="am-btn-confirm" [ngClass]="'am-confirm-' + currentAction.toLowerCase().replace(' ','-')"
        (click)="confirmAction()" [disabled]="isActing">
        <span *ngIf="!isActing">
          <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Confirm {{ currentAction }}
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isActing">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          Processing...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

```html
          <label>Land / building (market value)</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="landBuilding" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Motor vehicle</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="motorVehicle" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">

          <input type="number" formControlName="businessCapital" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Bank balance (all accounts)</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="bankBalance" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Cash in hand</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="cashInHand" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Investment (shares, bonds, DPS)</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="investment" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Gold / jewellery (value)</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="gold" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
        <div class="field">
          <label>Other assets</label>
          <input type="number" formControlName="otherAssets" min="0" placeholder="0" />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="assets-total-bar">
        <span>Total assets</span>
        <span class="assets-total-value">{{ fmt(totalAssets) }}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-hdr">
      <div class="card-hdr-left">
        <div class="hdr-icon ic-red">
          <i class="bi bi-credit-card-2-back-fill" style="font-size:12px;color:#A32D2D"></i>
        </div>
        <div>

          <div class="card-sub">Outstanding loans and financial obligations</div>

        </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="footer">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" (click)="prevStep()">← Back</button>

  </div>

                 class="payment-method-btn"

                   [value]="m.value" [disabled]="!m.available"

          </label>
        </div>
      </div>

              step6Form.value.challanAmount < balanceDue"
              style="color:#e67e22">

            </span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>


      <div *ngIf="isMfsMethod" class="payment-fields">
        <div class="alert alert-info" style="margin-bottom:14px">

            <strong *ngIf="selectedPaymentMethod === 'bkash'">bKash</strong>
            <strong *ngIf="selectedPaymentMethod === 'nagad'">Nagad</strong>

            merchant number. Enter the transaction ID from your confirmation SMS.
          </div>
        </div>

            Please use bank challan or MFS for now.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>


  <div class="card" *ngIf="!showPaymentSection && taxResult <= 0">
    <div class="card-p" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;">
```

```html
  <div class="action-modal" (click)="$event.stopPropagation()">
    <div class="am-header" [ngClass]="'am-' + currentAction.toLowerCase().replace(' ','-')">
      <div class="am-icon">
        <i [class]="
          currentAction === 'Submit'       ? 'bi bi-send-fill'           :
          currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'bi bi-search'              :
          currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'bi bi-check-circle-fill'   :
          currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'bi bi-x-circle-fill'       :
                                             'bi bi-arrow-return-left'
        "></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="am-title">{{ currentAction }} Return</div>
        <div class="am-sub">{{ itr?.returnNo }} — {{ itr?.taxpayerName }}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="am-body">
      <div class="am-info">
        <div class="am-info-row">
          <span>Current Status</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(itr?.status || '')">{{ itr?.status }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="am-info-row">
          <span>New Status</span>
          <span class="status-badge" [ngClass]="getStatusClass(
            currentAction === 'Submit'       ? 'Submitted'    :
            currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Under Review' :
            currentAction === 'Accept'       ? 'Accepted'     :
            currentAction === 'Reject'       ? 'Rejected'     : 'Send Back'
          )">
            {{ currentAction === 'Submit' ? 'Submitted' : currentAction === 'Start Review' ? 'Under Review' :
            currentAction === 'Accept' ? 'Accepted' : currentAction === 'Reject' ? 'Rejected' : 'Send Back' }}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="am-remarks-wrap">
        <label class="am-label">Remarks <span class="required-star"
            *ngIf="currentAction === 'Reject' || currentAction === 'Send Back'">* Required</span></label>
        <textarea class="am-remarks"
          [placeholder]="currentAction === 'Reject' ? 'Required — reason for rejection...' : currentAction === 'Send Back' ? 'Required — what needs correction...' : 'Optional remarks...'"
          [(ngModel)]="actionRemarks" rows="3">
        </textarea>
        <div class="am-error" *ngIf="actionError"><i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill"></i> {{ actionError }}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="am-footer">
      <button class="am-btn-cancel" (click)="closeModal()" [disabled]="isActing">Cancel</button>
      <button class="am-btn-confirm" [ngClass]="'am-confirm-' + currentAction.toLowerCase().replace(' ','-')"
        (click)="confirmAction()" [disabled]="isActing">
        <span *ngIf="!isActing"><i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Confirm {{ currentAction }}</span>
        <span *ngIf="isActing"><span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>Processing...</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```html
              {{ taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value }}
            </span>

                Taxpayer can file returns and make payments.
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Inactive'">
                Taxpayer account is currently inactive.
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Pending'">
                Taxpayer is awaiting verification.
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngIf="taxpayerForm.get('status')?.value === 'Suspended'">
                Taxpayer account has been suspended.
              </ng-container>
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

        <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i> Cancel
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-reset" (click)="onReset()" [disabled]="isLoading">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-counterclockwise"></i> Reset
      </button>
      <button type="submit" class="btn-submit" [disabled]="isLoading || taxpayerForm.invalid">
        <span *ngIf="!isLoading">
          <i class="bi bi-check-lg"></i> Save Profile
        </span>
        <span *ngIf="isLoading">
          <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm me-2"></span>
          Saving...
        </span>
      </button>
    </div>

  </form>
</div>
```

## File: src/app/models/business.model.ts
```typescript
import { BusinessCategory, BusinessType, District, Division } from "./master-data.model";
⋮----
export type BusinessStatus =
  | 'Active'
  | 'Inactive'
  | 'Suspended'
  | 'Cancelled'
  | 'Pending';
⋮----
export interface Business {
  id: number;
  businessRegNo: string;
  businessName: string;
  tinNumber: string;
  binNo?: string;
  ownerName: string;
  businessType: BusinessType;
  businessCategory: BusinessCategory;
  tradeLicenseNo: string;
  email?: string;
  phone: string;
  address?: string;
  status: BusinessStatus;
  annualTurnover?: number;
  numberOfEmployees?: number;
  incorporationDate?: string;
  registrationDate?: string;
  expiryDate?: string;
  remarks?: string;
  createdAt?: string;

  taxpayer?: { id: number; fullName?: string; tinNumber?: string };
  taxpayerId?: number;

  division?: Division;
  district?: District;

  divisionId?: number;
  districtId?: number;
}
⋮----
export interface BusinessCreateRequest {
  taxpayerId: number;
  businessName: string;
  tinNumber: string;
  ownerName: string;

  businessTypeId: number;
  businessCategoryId: number;

  tradeLicenseNo: string;
  incorporationDate?: string;
  registrationDate: string;
  expiryDate?: string;
  email?: string;
  phone: string;
  status: BusinessStatus;
  address: string;
  districtId: number;
  divisionId: number;
  annualTurnover: number;
  numberOfEmployees: number;
  remarks: string;
}
⋮----
export interface BusinessVatStatus {
  id:                  number;
  businessRegNo:       string;
  businessName:        string;
  ownerName:           string;
  tradeLicenseNo:      string;
  businessTypeId:      number | null;
  businessTypeName:    string;
  businessCategoryId:  number | null;
  businessCategoryName: string;
  divisionId:          number | null;
  divisionName:        string;
  districtId:          number | null;
  districtName:        string;
  email:               string;
  phone:               string;
  address:             string;
  status:              string;
  annualTurnover:      number;
  vatRegistered:       boolean;
  binNo:               string | null;
  vatStatus:           string | null;
}
```

## File: src/app/models/taxpayer.model.ts
```typescript
import { TaxpayerType } from './master-data.model';
⋮----
export type TaxpayerStatus = 'Active' | 'Inactive' | 'Pending' | 'Suspended';
⋮----
export interface Address {
  houseNo?: string;
  roadVillage?: string;
  ward?: string;
  thana: string;
  district: string;
  division: string;
  postalCode?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface Taxpayer {
  id?: number;
  tinNumber?: string;
  taxpayerType: TaxpayerType;


  fullName?: string;
  gender?: 'Male' | 'Female' | 'Other';
  fathersName?: string;
  mothersName?: string;
  maritalStatus?: 'Single' | 'Married' | 'Divorced' | 'Widowed';
  nid?: string;
  dateOfBirth?: string;
  profession?: string;
  photoPath?: string;


  companyName?: string;
  incorporationDate?: string;
  tradeLicenseNo?: string;
  rjscNo?: string;
  natureOfBusiness?: string;


  authorizedPersonName?: string;
  authorizedPersonNid?: string;
  authorizedPersonDesignation?: string;


  email: string;
  phone: string;
  presentAddress?: Address;
  permanentAddress?: Address;
  sameAsPermanent?: boolean;

  status: TaxpayerStatus;
  registrationDate?: string;

  approvalStatus?: 'PENDING_REVIEW' | 'APPROVED' | 'REJECTED';
  reviewNotes?: string;
  reviewedAt?: string;
}
⋮----
export interface TaxpayerCreateRequest extends Omit<
  Taxpayer,
  'id' | 'tinNumber'
> {}
```

```typescript
import { Component, OnInit, OnDestroy } from '@angular/core';
```
